# Shelf — Full Documentation for LLMs

> Shelf is an open-source asset management platform for modern teams. Track equipment, manage bookings, and prevent double-bookings — free for individuals, no credit card required.

Shelf helps teams track physical assets — equipment, tools, devices, kits — with QR-based workflows, conflict-free bookings, custody tracking, and audit-ready reports. Used by universities, production studios, IT teams, and field operations worldwide.

Website: https://shelf.nu
App: https://app.shelf.nu
Docs: https://docs.shelf.nu
GitHub: https://github.com/Shelf-nu/shelf.nu

---

## Features

### Bookings
https://shelf.nu/features/bookings
Conflict-free equipment reservations that keep teams coordinated and ensure shared resources are available when needed. Prevents double-bookings automatically. Teams can reserve assets for specific time periods with approval workflows.

### Custody
https://shelf.nu/features/custody
Track who is responsible for each asset at every moment, with a clear audit trail and effortless handovers. Check assets in and out with QR scans. Full custody history shows every transfer.

### Audits
https://shelf.nu/features/audits
Run physical inventory audits with structured scan workflows, automatic found/missing/unexpected detection, and exportable reports. Mobile app supports barcode and QR scanning for fast audit completion.

### Location Tracking
https://shelf.nu/features/location-tracking
Know where every asset is — rooms, buildings, job sites, vehicles — with quick updates and clear visibility. Hierarchical locations let you organize by building, floor, room, or any custom structure.

### Asset Pages
https://shelf.nu/features/asset-pages
Rich detail pages for every asset — photos, custom fields, location history, availability status, notes, and QR tags. Every asset gets a dedicated page as a single source of truth. Supports seven custom field types.

### Kits
https://shelf.nu/features/kits
Group equipment and accessories so everything stays together — cameras with lenses, tools with components, and devices with chargers. Book entire kits as a single unit.

### Calendar
https://shelf.nu/features/calendar
Visual booking calendar with month, week, and day views for complete asset availability at a glance. See all reservations across your team in one place.

### Dashboard
https://shelf.nu/features/dashboard
A real-time view of bookings, custody, overdue items, and asset usage — giving teams clarity at a glance. Customizable overview of your asset operations.

### Asset Search
https://shelf.nu/features/asset-search
Full-database search across all asset fields — find any item by name, custodian, category, status, or custom field. Instant results at any scale.

### Asset Reminders
https://shelf.nu/features/asset-reminders
Automated reminders for returns, inspections, rentals, and maintenance events — keeping teams proactive and compliant. Notifications via email and in-app alerts.

### Workspaces
https://shelf.nu/features/workspaces
Organize assets and permissions across departments or teams, giving each group control while keeping administrators in sync. Separate inventories with shared visibility.

---

## Pricing

### Personal — Free Forever
- 1 user
- Unlimited assets
- Mobile app (iOS & Android)
- Basic QR codes
- Custody tracking
- No credit card required

### Plus — $34/month (or $190/year)
- 1 user
- Unlimited assets
- Custom QR codes with branding
- Email support
- Maintenance schedules
- CSV import/export

### Team — $67/month (or $370/year)
- Unlimited users
- Unlimited assets
- Full bookings and calendar
- Fixed-period checkout
- Team permissions
- SSO available as add-on
- 7-day free trial

### Enterprise — Custom Pricing
- Everything in Team
- Dedicated account manager
- SLA
- SSO included
- Custom onboarding
- Priority support

Pricing page: https://shelf.nu/pricing

---

## Solutions

- [Asset Tracking](https://shelf.nu/solutions/asset-tracking): End-to-end tracking for physical assets with QR codes, location history, and real-time status.
- [Equipment Management](https://shelf.nu/solutions/equipment-management): Manage equipment lifecycle from procurement to disposal.
- [Equipment Reservations](https://shelf.nu/solutions/equipment-reservations): Conflict-free reservation system for shared equipment.
- [Equipment Checkout Software](https://shelf.nu/solutions/equipment-check-in): Streamline check-in and check-out workflows with QR scanning.
- [Camera Equipment Check-Out](https://shelf.nu/solutions/camera-equipment-check-out): Purpose-built for film, media, and AV equipment pools.
- [Fixed Asset Tracking](https://shelf.nu/solutions/fixed-asset-tracking): Track fixed assets for accounting and compliance.
- [IT Asset Tracking](https://shelf.nu/solutions/it-asset-tracking): Manage laptops, peripherals, and IT equipment assignments.
- [Tool Tracking](https://shelf.nu/solutions/tool-tracking): Track tools across job sites, vehicles, and storage locations.
- [Mobile Asset Auditing](https://shelf.nu/solutions/mobile-asset-auditing): Run audits from your phone with barcode and QR scanning.
- [Open Source Asset Management](https://shelf.nu/solutions/open-source-asset-management): Self-hostable, transparent, no vendor lock-in.
- [Home Inventory Management](https://shelf.nu/solutions/home-inventory-management): Track personal belongings for insurance and organization.
- [Educational Resource Management](https://shelf.nu/solutions/educational-resource-management): Manage shared resources in schools and universities.

---

## Industries

### Construction
https://shelf.nu/industries/construction
Track tools, equipment, and job-site gear with fast, mobile-first workflows built for crews working across locations, vehicles, and storage areas.

### Education
https://shelf.nu/industries/education
Manage shared equipment — AV gear, cameras, laptops, lab resources — with simple workflows built for students and staff. Used by universities like Eastern Michigan University and Kansas City Art Institute.

### IT & Technology
https://shelf.nu/industries/it-technology
Track laptops, loaner devices, peripherals, and shared equipment with fast QR-first workflows, custody tracking, and conflict-free bookings.

### Media & Production
https://shelf.nu/industries/media-production
Manage cameras, lighting gear, audio kits, and accessories with simple, fast workflows designed for real-world shoots. Used by production studios like Fabel Film.

---

## Case Studies

### CES Utility Solutions — $70K Equipment Recovery
https://shelf.nu/case-studies/ces-70k-recovery
CES recovered $70,000 worth of lost drone equipment using Shelf's QR labels and location tracking.

### Fabel Film — Zero Double Bookings
https://shelf.nu/case-studies/fabel-film-double-bookings
Fabel Film eliminated double bookings entirely by moving from memory-based coordination to Shelf's booking system.

### ResQ — 4,000+ Devices Tracked
https://shelf.nu/case-studies/resq-contact-center
ResQ manages 4,000+ contact center assets across multiple sites with Shelf's workspace and custody features.

### HAARP — 7 Universities, 1 System
https://shelf.nu/case-studies/haarp
HAARP manages multi-university research assets across the Alaskan Arctic using a single Shelf workspace.

### Eastern Michigan University
https://shelf.nu/case-studies/eastern-michigan-university
Theatre and media equipment management for students and staff.

### Arellano Associates
https://shelf.nu/case-studies/arellano-associates
Transformed event equipment management from Outlook chaos to real-time clarity with Shelf.

### Kansas City Art Institute
https://shelf.nu/case-studies/kcai
Seamless migration from Cheqroom to Shelf for art equipment management.

---

## Competitor Comparisons

Shelf provides detailed comparisons against these asset management platforms:

- [vs Asset Panda](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/asset-panda)
- [vs Sortly](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/sortly)
- [vs Snipe-IT](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/snipe-it)
- [vs Cheqroom](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/cheqroom)
- [vs EZOfficeInventory](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/ezofficeinventory)
- [vs AssetTiger](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/asset-tiger)
- [vs BlueTally](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/blue-tally)
- [vs Itemit](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/itemit)
- [vs GoCodes](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/gocodes)
- [vs Hardcat](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/hardcat)
- [vs Timly](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/timly)
- [vs UpKeep](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/upkeep)
- [vs Limble CMMS](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/limble)
- [vs WebCheckout](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/webcheckout)
- [vs Hector](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/hector)
- [vs ShareMyToolbox](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/share-my-toolbox)
- [vs BriteCheck](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/brite-check)
- [vs AssetGuru](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/asset-guru)
- [vs Asset Infinity](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/asset-infinity)
- [vs Wasp Barcode](https://shelf.nu/alternatives/wasp)

---

## Free Tools

- [MACRS Depreciation Calculator](https://shelf.nu/tools/macrs-depreciation-calculator): Calculate tax depreciation using the Modified Accelerated Cost Recovery System.
- [Equipment Depreciation Calculator](https://shelf.nu/tools/equipment-depreciation-calculator): Calculate straight-line and declining balance depreciation for equipment.
- [Salvage Value Calculator](https://shelf.nu/tools/salvage-value-calculator): Estimate the residual value of assets at end of useful life.
- [Asset ROI Calculator](https://shelf.nu/tools/asset-roi-calculator): Calculate return on investment for asset purchases.
- [QR Code Generator](https://shelf.nu/tools/qr-code-generator): Generate free QR codes for any URL or text.
- [QR Code Decoder](https://shelf.nu/tools/qr-code-decoder): Scan and decode QR codes from images.
- [Asset Label Designer](https://shelf.nu/tools/asset-label-designer): Design and print custom asset labels with QR codes.

---

## Use Cases

- [AV Equipment Management](https://shelf.nu/use-cases/av-equipment-management): How AV teams manage cameras, audio gear, lighting kits, and accessories.
- [IT Asset Management](https://shelf.nu/use-cases/it-asset-management): Track laptops, chargers, carts, peripherals, and user-assigned equipment.
- [Tool Tracking](https://shelf.nu/use-cases/tool-tracking): Track tools across job sites, technicians, vehicles, and storage.

---

## About Shelf

Mission: Asset tracking for everyone.

Shelf is an open-source platform built for people who need clarity over what they own, where it is, and who has it. Physical assets are still managed with fragile tools — spreadsheets, clipboards, and disconnected systems. Shelf exists to make asset management simple, transparent, and accessible without lock-in or hidden complexity.

Led by Carlos Virreira and Nikolay Bonev, supported by an open-source community.

Core values:
- Open Source: No black boxes. Verify the code, self-host, or use managed cloud.
- Community Driven: Built with feedback from real users in education, logistics, and tech.

- [Contact](https://shelf.nu/contact)
